title: OPTIONS COUNSELING - 211info
text: HERMISTON OPTIONS COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Options counselors assist individuals in making informed decisions about long-term care. Counselors help determine strengths, needs, preferences, and unique situations. Provides information about support strategies, action plans, and tactics based on the choices available in the community. Options Counseling can be a stand-alone service for a participant or can lead to Older Americans Act Case Management (OAA). OAA is a service for individuals who need ongoing support to remain independent. Care coordinators assist in problem-solving, advocate, and connect participants to resources and community support to enhance the quality of life and future planning for later years. 1565 N 1st Street Suite 1 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Options Counseling: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and their family members or caregivers -OAA: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 289-7755 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 289-7755 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Hood River, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Older Adults Case/Care Management * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Long Term Care Options Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HERMISTON
